title: Blue Polypropylene Rope 30m Long 6mm Rope Maximum Breaking Load 530kg - Hard-Wearing 3-Strand Split Film Polypropylene Cord - Strong Rope for Tarpaulin Strapping Items Cargo Boating Washing Line
features: Your Peace of Mind: The available poly ropes in the market snap, do not hold the load, frayed upon cut, loosely bound strands. While our polypropylene cords are made with reliable material and last longer. Do follow care instructions

Reliable Ties You Need: Made with 3-strand split Polypropylene, Tradeen blue ropes are sturdy. 30m long rope with a 6mm diameter will help you in various tasks. Confidently tie your belongings or show off your creative crafts
Heavy Working Load: Unlike others, our 6mm rope holds up to 530 kg. Though it's not built explicitly for just swings or body weight, some people try and it does work for them
Ease in the Air: Our outdoor ropes are waterproof, weather-resistant, lightweight, easy to handle, float & shrink-proof. Easy to knot. Easy to cut

One for All: Hundreds of uses in the home, garden, agriculture, boating, or industry. Use for DIY craft, cloth liner, lash down a tarp, tie-down tarpaulin, Christmas trees, to hold during high wind, wrap around bbq cover, table chairs, etc
description: Product Description Tradeen is a UK brand. Our mission is to bring ease and comfort to day-to-day life. We’ve dependable tarp & tie down do-it-yourself products that protect your belongings. During harsh weather, your tarpaulin fell due to a loose knot of polypropylene rope or when you cut the rope it starts fraying due to loosely bound strands or the rope cord is not strong enough to hold the load or it’s not flexible enough to tie a knot. Definitely you will be annoyed further if you find out, the company is not providing any support. You deserve the peace of mind & courtesy. Tradeen however makes a significant difference. Our 6mm ropes are strong enough with a breaking load of 530kg, made with hard-wearing 3 split-film polypropylene. Our strong rope is lightweight, weather-resistant, and easy to handle for your peace of mind. Not to forget, our customer-first philosophy.
